category_sources: source_facts.description says PDF files password cracker; official PDFCrack site describes a command-line password recovery tool for PDF files.
display_name_sources: Official project homepage heading is PDFCrack; source_facts.name is pdfcrack.
docs_sources: Official PDFCrack homepage and FAQ are the project-maintained documentation surfaces linked from the official site.
repo_sources: source_facts.repo is empty; official SourceForge project and homepage provide downloads/project pages but no distinct official source-control repository URL was confirmed.
tags_sources: source_facts.executables lists pdfcrack; official SourceForge page categorizes the project under Cryptography, PDF, and Password Recovery and lists C as the programming language.
